response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and extensive cloud and containerization exposure. His current work with AI-agent infrastructure, deep expertise in TDD and testing frameworks, and prior experience with Java make him an exceptionally strong candidate for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java).
Direct, current experience building AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows using MCP.
Exceptional background in software testing, including TDD, CI/CD, and creating custom testing libraries.
concerns: Does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest, though his strong Node.js and testing background mitigates this.
Has held 'Staff' titles recently, which might mean he is looking for a role with higher scope than a standard Senior IC position.
Concurrent roles (e.g., Founder at MercadoLibre since 2016 alongside full-time roles) might require clarification regarding his availability and focus.
